what_it_does: Renders a small dark 'MENU' pill button with a chevron, toggling an 'open' CSS class based on the open prop and calling onClick when pressed.
observations: Functional React component with destructured props open and onClick
Class name combines 'vh-menu-btn' with 'open' when open is truthy
Contains a chevron span ('⌃') and a 'MENU' text span
Assigns the component to window.MenuButton for global access
No imports, prop-types, or accessibility attributes are present
conventions: Props destructured in the function signature
Conditional className built with a template literal
Component exposed on window for non-module consumption
concerns: Global window assignment can create naming conflicts
No ARIA attributes such as aria-expanded or aria-label
Styling and positioning depend entirely on external CSS
notes: A tiny, globally-registered menu trigger whose only stateful behavior is adding an 'open' class to a styled pill button.
questions: What parent component manages the open/onClick state?
Is the window.MenuButton export consumed by legacy or non-React code?
Where are the vh-menu-btn and open styles defined?
apparent_themes: Global component registration for easy reuse
intention_signals: Provide a reusable, lightweight menu toggle button for the virtual-hub UI kit that visually signals open/closed state with a chevron and a conditional class.
contribution: A compact menu trigger component with a clear open-state visual hook and a global export, which a fused system could keep as a simple, reusable pill button pattern.
summary_for_embedding: MenuButton.jsx defines a small React functional component that renders a dark 'MENU' pill button with a chevron and toggles an 'open' CSS class based on a boolean prop, then assigns it to window.MenuButton.
intention_for_embedding: Intended as a globally available, reusable menu toggle button for the virtual-hub UI kit.

symbols.code_id: code://counterpart-design/reference/ConceptV Design System-handoff/conceptv-design-system/project/ui_kits/virtual-hub/MenuButton.jsx::MenuButton | component | function MenuButton({ open, onClick }) {
symbols.does: Renders a bottom-center 'MENU' pill button that conditionally applies an 'open' class and forwards an onClick handler.
symbols.description: MenuButton is a stateless React component that accepts open and onClick props. It returns a button with the class 'vh-menu-btn' plus 'open' when appropriate, containing a chevron span and a 'MENU' label, and is exposed globally via window.MenuButton.
